parts.text: We want to add premium channels for our business lounge.
We need to switch to a different cable package for the company.
Our billing contact changed, and we need to update account details.
We want to remove some channels from our current plan.
We’re expanding and need to update our cable subscription.
We need to add additional cable boxes for new meeting rooms.
Our business hours changed, and we need to adjust service settings.
We want to upgrade to a higher-speed cable plan.
Our office moved, and we need to update the service address.
We need to add more channels to our business cable package.
